noJoinedData.title: No joined data yet
noJoinedData.body: Scheduling efficiency requires both staff hours (Personalkollen) and revenue (POS) data for the same dates. Try expanding the date range.

status.leanHint: High revenue per hour — you're doing a lot with the hours scheduled.
status.on_targetHint: Revenue per labour hour within ±20% of your weekly average.
status.overstaffedHint: Revenue per hour is low — more hours scheduled than demand needs. Consider trimming.
status.no_dataHint: Fewer than 2 days of joined data for this weekday.

aiMap.emptyTitle: No PK shifts found for this window
aiMap.emptyBody: Either the schedule isn't published yet in Personalkollen, or the integration needs reconnecting.

hero.currentAfter: Current schedule · After applying {count, plural, one {# ready day} other {# ready days}}
hero.noForecast: No revenue forecast available — labour ratio can't be computed yet.
hero.daysReadyAmber: {ready, plural, one {# ready} other {# ready}} · {amber, plural, one {# amber} other {# amber}}

ready.title: Open Personalkollen and trim {count, plural, one {# day} other {# days}}
ready.openBtnTitle: Opens Personalkollen in a new tab — make the cuts there, then come back and click Apply to record them

legend.ready: {count, plural, one {# day · ready to apply} other {# days · ready to apply}}
legend.needsCall: {count, plural, one {# day · needs your call} other {# days · needs your call}}

row.amberDefault: Pattern says lighter, but you may know more — your call.
row.alignedBody: Schedule already aligned with the pattern.

actions.apply: Apply {count, plural, one {# ready day} other {# ready days}}
